text:
Sick Villagers 病気の村人 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots". 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Sick Villagers 病気の村人 - These are very sick villagers. Their entire village has befallen a horrible illness. Any player who happens to come close to their village, will be approached by these villagers and taken back to their houses where they'll be asked for money and clothes.
